text: The dimly lit, almost abandoned space evokes a sense of loneliness in me. Shadows stretch in every direction; electronic screens glow faintly, hinting at activity but offering no comfort. The cryptic nature of these surroundings and the clinical architecture make me feel small, as if I have stumbled into a place between worlds. My curiosity is tinged with apprehension. I sense I am on the threshold of something unknown—uncanny, yet quietly beckoning.
